results.name: Anchorage's Winter City Tour
results.summary: Embark on a captivating 2.5 to 3-hour journey through Anchorage's winter wonderland. Experience the charm of local culture and history as you visit iconic sites like Snow Ella, the Ulu Factory, and Earthquake Park. With opportunities for moose sightings and breathtaking views, this tour promises unforgettable memories in Alaska's unique landscape.
results.headline: Sip Coffee With A Pilot + Taste Reindeer Sausage + Explore Every Site + Watch For Wildlife

results.name: One Hour Trolley City Tour
results.summary: Experience Anchorage like never before on our fully narrated trolley tour! Journey through 15 miles of scenic beauty and rich history, guided by locals sharing personal stories. Spot moose, witness seaplanes, and explore historic neighborhoods, all while enjoying a complimentary coupon book for local attractions. Start your Alaskan adventure today!
results.headline: 1 Hour • For all ages! • Fully narrated • Anchorage's best sights and history in 60 minutes!

results.name: Deluxe Trolley City Tour
results.summary: Experience Anchorage like never before on the Deluxe City Tour! Over 90 minutes, explore historical sites, cultural landmarks, and stunning neighborhoods while listening to captivating local stories. Enjoy unique stops at Earthquake Park and Lake Hood, spot wildlife, and capture breathtaking views, all guided by passionate Alaskans.
results.headline: 1.5 - 2 Hours • Fully narrated tour • Get off and take photos at 3+ stops!

results.name: Helicopter & Glacier Dogsled + Knik Glacier Landing
results.summary: Fly over glaciers, then land on a snowy mountain glacier for a dog sled ride with real huskies. Explore blue melt pools and ice formations, spotting wildlife along the way—an unforgettable Arctic adventure in just 2 hours.
results.headline: 2 hours 2 Landings! • Round Trip Transportation Available!
results.tags_name: Air Activities-Air Tour-Dogsled-Guided Tour-Photography Tour-Sightseeing Tour-Wildlife

results.name: Grand Knik
results.summary: Soar over Knik Glacier's stunning icy walls, land at three breathtaking spots—blue melt pools, alpine ridges, and icy valleys—each offering unforgettable views, wildlife sightings, and photo opportunities in every season.
results.headline: 2 hours | 3 Unforgettable Landings

results.name: Glacier Swim & Hike
results.summary: Soar over glaciers and mountains in a scenic helicopter ride, then land on shimmering ice for a guided trek and icy swim. An exhilarating, immersive adventure perfect for thrill-seekers craving true glacier exploration.
results.headline: 2 Hours | June - September
results.tags_name: Air Activities-Air Tour-Wellness-Guided Tour-Hiking-Sightseeing Tour-Water Activities

results.name: Helicopter & Glacier Dogsled
results.summary: Soar over glaciers in a helicopter, then mush a team of champion sled dogs across summer snowfields. Enjoy stunning mountain views, wildlife sightings, and a thrilling adventure for the whole family.
results.headline: 1.5 hours • Round Trip Transportation Available!
results.tags_name: Air Activities-Air Tour-Dogsled-Guided Tour-Photography Tour-Sightseeing Tour-Wildlife

results.name: Heli Glacier Paddleboarding
results.summary: Soar over stunning Alaskan peaks in a helicopter, then land on Knik Glacier to trek icy crevasses and paddleboard in crystal-blue melt pools. An adrenaline-filled adventure blending flightseeing, glacier exploration, and water fun.
results.headline: 3.5 Hours Private Tour
results.tags_name: Air Activities-Air Tour-Wellness-Guided Tour-Private-Sightseeing Tour-Water Activities

results.name: Seward Helicopter & Glacier Dogsled + Kenai Fjords Landing
results.summary: Soar over Kenai Fjords, then land on a glacier to mush a six-time Iditarod champion team. Enjoy stunning views of glaciers, wildlife, and icy lagoons—an unforgettable summer adventure for the whole family.
results.headline: 2 Hours | 2 Landings

results.name: Knik Glacier Landing
results.summary: Fly over Knik Glacier, land on the ice, and explore blue crevasses and icy sculptures up close. Capture stunning photos, enjoy a short guided walk, and experience Alaska's breathtaking frozen landscape in just 1 hour.
results.headline: Essential On-Ice Moment

results.name: Summer Glacier Ice Climbing
results.summary: Soar over towering peaks by helicopter to the stunning Knik Glacier, then tackle vertical blue ice with expert guides. No experience needed—just your spirit of adventure and a love for breathtaking scenery.
results.headline: Climb Ancient Ice | Beginners Welcome

results.name: Kenai Fjords Landing
results.summary: Soar over Kenai Fjords and Resurrection Bay, marvel at glaciers and icebergs, and land on a remote beach or mountain for stunning views. Spot wildlife, breathe in fresh air, and capture unforgettable moments on this scenic flight.
results.headline: 1 hour | 1 Incredible Landing

results.name: Glacier Elopement Package
results.summary: Soar over glaciers and mountains in a private helicopter, then say your vows on a stunning ice or alpine site. Capture unforgettable moments with scenic landings, optional ceremonies, champagne, and breathtaking views.
results.headline: 2 Landings 2 Hours - Departs from Alaska Glacier Lodge

results.name: Winter Glacier Exploration
results.summary: Fly to remote Knik Glacier for a guided, photo-friendly glacier walk with micro spikes, scenic flights, and expert instruction. Perfect for beginners, enjoy icy textures, quiet snowfields, and stunning natural beauty in a relaxed pace.
results.headline: Ice skating, trekking, and more!
results.tags_name: Air Activities-Air Tour-Guided Tour-Photography Tour-Sightseeing Tour-Winter Activities

results.name: Seward Wildlife Explorer
results.summary: Soar above glaciers, rugged peaks, and turquoise waters on a 60-minute flight over Kenai Fjords. Spot whales, sea lions, and mountain goats while taking in Alaska's wild beauty from a breathtaking perspective.
results.headline: 1 Hour of Breathtaking Flightseeing
results.tags_name: Air Activities-Air Tour-Photography Tour-Sightseeing Tour-Whale Watch-Wildlife

results.name: Seward Grand Glaciers & Fjords
results.summary: Soar above Alaska's stunning glaciers and rugged coastlines on a scenic helicopter tour. Enjoy breathtaking views, wildlife sightings, and two exciting landings on remote beaches and mountain icefields.

results.name: Seward 30 Minute Scenic Flight
results.summary: Soar over Resurrection Bay to Bear Glacier's stunning blue icebergs and icy lagoons. Watch massive 200-ft icebergs roll, spot playful seals, and capture breathtaking views of Alaska's largest glacier in just 30 minutes.
results.headline: $399 | 30 Mins

results.name: Knik Polar Dip
results.summary: Plunge into icy glacier pools on Knik Glacier after a scenic helicopter flight over rugged mountains and icy landscapes. Feel the thrill of Alaska's wild beauty in this unforgettable, heart-pumping adventure.
results.headline: 1.5 Hours | Take the PLUNGE!
results.tags_name: Air Activities-Air Tour-Wellness-Guided Tour-Sightseeing Tour-Water Activities

results.name: Alaska Wildlife Tour
results.summary: Embark on a captivating 4-hour tour from Anchorage, exploring the stunning Seward Parkway and the breathtaking Turnagain Arm. Encounter Alaska's majestic wildlife at the Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center, where you can observe and learn about rehabilitated animals like grizzly bears and moose up close, making for an unforgettable experience.
results.headline: Adult $119, Child $99 | 4 Hour Tour | GREAT TOUR FOR CHILDREN!

results.name: Turnagain Arm Tour
results.summary: Embark on a captivating 6-hour tour of Turnagain Arm, where stunning landscapes and wildlife await. Journey along the scenic Seward Parkway, visit the Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center, and enjoy breathtaking views from the Chugach Mountains. With expert guidance and ample photo opportunities, this adventure promises unforgettable memories in Alaska's natural beauty.
results.headline: Adult $159, Child $139 | 5 - 6 Hour Tour | ENJOY THE BEAUTY OF THE TURNAGAIN ARM

results.name: Glacier & Wildlife Discovery Tour
results.summary: Embark on a breathtaking day tour from Anchorage to Portage Glacier, where you'll cruise across Portage Lake for stunning glacier views. Experience the scenic Seward Parkway, wildlife sightings at Beluga Point, and visit the Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center to learn about rehabilitated animals. Capture unforgettable memories amidst Alaska's natural beauty.
results.headline: Adult $259, Child $199 | 7 Hour Tour | OUR MOST POPULAR DAY TOUR!

results.name: Anchorage Greenbelt Bike Tour
results.summary: Cycle through Anchorage's lush greenbelts, spotting moose, eagles, and bears on a scenic 29-mile ride past coastal trails, creeks, and parks—immersing yourself in wild Alaska right in the city.

results.name: Knik Glacier Explorer-90 Minutes
results.summary: Soar over snow-capped peaks and braided rivers, then step onto the ancient Knik Glacier to explore icy blue pools, deep crevasses, and stunning ice formations. Spot wildlife and enjoy breathtaking Alaskan wilderness from above and on the ice.
results.headline: Available All Year • 90min Total • 40min Flight + Glacier Landing

results.name: 4 Hour Elopement Package With Professional Photography • R66
results.summary: Say "I do" on a glacier or mountain peak with stunning aerial views. Our pilots fly you away from crowds, while professional photographers capture breathtaking moments in a 3-hour private flight.
results.headline: $6,100 • Three Seats • Includes Photography and 1 Add'l Seat • 4 Hours • 2-3 Landing

results.name: Special Moments
results.summary: Soar over Alaska's stunning glaciers in a private helicopter, land near massive blue melt pools, and capture unforgettable photos. Celebrate your moment with champagne and dessert on this exclusive, scenic adventure.
results.headline: Private | Your Choice of 1 or 2 Landings

results.name: Matanuska Glacier Hike & Tour – Winter Edition
results.summary: Explore Alaska's stunning Matanuska Glacier on a guided winter hike through icy caves and towering crevasses. Enjoy scenic drives, learn about the glacier's history, and experience the magic of a snowy, blue-ice wonderland.
results.headline: Truly the most popular - Winter is so breath taking!

results.name: Heli-Hiking
results.summary: Fly over glaciers and rugged mountains in a helicopter, then hike high-alpine trails with stunning views. Customize your adventure, take photos, and explore at your own pace in a small, personal group.
results.headline: 4 Hours
results.tags_name: Air Activities-Air Tour-Guided Tour-Hiking-Photography Tour-Walking Tour-Wildlife

results.name: Anchorage Northern Lights Tour
results.summary: Chase the Northern Lights on an 8-hour tour from Anchorage, with expert guides, prime viewing spots, stunning photos, hot drinks, and cozy transport. Witness one of Earth's greatest natural wonders in magical Alaska.
results.headline: Starting at $325 per person  • Ages 13+ • 8 Hours • Transportation included

results.name: Hatcher Pass ATV Adventure
results.summary: Embark on an unforgettable 3-hour ATV or UTV adventure through the breathtaking Talkeetna Mountains at Hatcher Pass. Experience Alaska's hidden gems, including stunning landscapes, historical mines, and diverse wildlife. Perfect for both seasoned riders and newcomers, this tour promises excitement and natural beauty in every turn.
results.headline: Half Day ATV/UTV Tour 9 am & 1 pm Departures • Ages 18+ to Drive • 3.0 Hours

results.name: Winter Sled Dog Experience
results.summary: Race through a snowy birch forest pulled by powerful Alaska Huskies, guiding your own team with expert support. Feel the thrill of winter adventure on legendary trails—an unforgettable, once-in-a-lifetime experience.
results.headline: Ages 12+ • 2 Hours • YOU Mush Your Own Team!

company.name: Rock On Racing Sled Dog Tours
